name: German
description: how much I like the sound/writing of the name in German
example: Maybe you like how the name 'Stefan' sounds in German, but do not like it at all in English. Then, you should give it a high score for this category.

name: English
description: how much I like the sound/writing of the name in English
example: Maybe you hate how the name 'Stefan' sounds in English, but like it in German. Then, you should give it a low score for this category.

name: Exotic
example: This score should reflect how unique or uncommon the name feels to you.

name: Relatives
description: you have a relative with this name

name: Friends
description: you have a friend with this name

name: Colleagues
description: you have a colleague with this name

name: Other
description: you have some other reason for excluding this name
